docString:
The `rsuffices` tactic is an alternative version of `suffices`, that allows the usage
of any syntax that would be valid in an `obtain` block. This tactic just calls `obtain`
on the expression, and then `rotate_left`.

ref.pp:
/-- The `rsuffices` tactic is an alternative version of `suffices`, that allows the usage
of any syntax that would be valid in an `obtain` block. This tactic just calls `obtain`
on the expression, and then `rotate_left`.
-/
@[tactic_parser 1000]
public meta def rsuffices : Lean.ParserDescrâśť :=
  ParserDescr.nodeâśť `Mathlib.Tactic.rsuffices 1022
    (ParserDescr.binaryâśť `andthen
      (ParserDescr.binaryâśť `andthen
        (ParserDescr.binaryâśť `andthen (ParserDescr.nonReservedSymbolâśť "rsuffices" falseâśť)

        (ParserDescr.unaryâśť `optional

          ((with_annotate_term"sepBy1(" @ParserDescr.sepBy1âśť) (ParserDescr.catâśť `term 0) "," (ParserDescr.symbolâśť ", ")
            Bool.falseâśť))))
